# Implementation Plan: Flutter Ansible Role

**Branch**: `004-flutter-role` | **Date**: 2026-04-04 | **Spec**: [spec.md](spec.md)
**Input**: Feature specification from `/specs/004-flutter-role/spec.md`

**Note**: This plan was generated by the `/speckit.plan` command.

## Summary

Create a new Ansible role `flutter` that installs the Flutter SDK (stable
channel) from the official `.tar.xz` archive on AMD64 Linux, configures
PATH for all desktop users, and satisfies the Chrome/web target in
`flutter doctor`. The role follows the `android_studio` role as a structural
template: apt prerequisites first, per-user SDK extraction, PATH via
`blockinfile`, and an idempotency guard that compares the installed version
against `flutter_version`.

## Technical Context

**Language/Version**: YAML (Ansible 2.19+)
**Primary Dependencies**: `ansible.builtin.*` modules; `community.general`
collection (already in `requirements.yml`)
**Storage**: Per-user SDK directory at `/home/{{ item }}/flutter`; PATH
block in `~/.bashrc`
**Testing**: Vagrant local VM (AMD64 Docker or Tart) per `CONTRIBUTING.md`
**Target Platform**: AMD64 Ubuntu/Debian Linux (Hetzner Cloud `hobbiton`);
ARM64 hosts skipped
**Project Type**: Ansible role
**Performance Goals**: N/A (provisioning, not runtime)
**Constraints**: Idempotent on re-runs; no changed tasks on second run
**Scale/Scope**: Single role, single playbook entry; `desktop_user_names`
users on one host

## Constitution Check

*GATE: Must pass before Phase 0 research. Re-check after Phase 1 design.*

| Principle | Status | Notes |
| --------- | ------ | ----- |
| I. Idempotency | PASS | Version guard skips download/extract when installed version matches `flutter_version`; `blockinfile` and `apt` are idempotent by default |
| II. Role-First Organisation | PASS | Implemented as `roles/flutter/`; playbook entry in `configure-linux-roles.yml` only |
| III. Test Locally Before Cloud | PASS | Must be tested on local Vagrant AMD64 VM before applying to `hobbiton` |
| IV. Simplicity (YAGNI) | PASS | No speculative abstraction; mirrors `android_studio` pattern exactly |
| V. Conventional Commits | PASS | Will use `feat:` prefix |
| VI. Markdown Quality Standards | PASS | All `.md` files must pass markdownlint |
| VII. Structured Problem Solving | PASS | Will follow remediation protocol if obstacles arise |

## Project Structure

### Documentation (this feature)

```text
specs/004-flutter-role/
├── plan.md              # This file (/speckit.plan command output)
├── research.md          # Phase 0 output (/speckit.plan command)
├── data-model.md        # Phase 1 output (/speckit.plan command)
├── quickstart.md        # Phase 1 output (/speckit.plan command)
└── tasks.md             # Phase 2 output (/speckit.tasks command - NOT created by /speckit.plan)
```

No `contracts/` directory: this role has no external API, endpoint, or
interface contract beyond the Ansible variable interface documented in the
role's `README.md` and `data-model.md`.

### Source Code (repository root)

```text
roles/flutter/
├── defaults/
│   └── main.yml          # flutter_version, flutter_sha256
├── meta/
│   └── main.yml          # galaxy_info; dependencies: []
├── tasks/
│   └── main.yml          # all role tasks
├── README.md             # role docs; android_studio prerequisite
└── DESIGN.md             # non-obvious decisions

configure-linux-roles.yml   # add flutter entry after android_studio
```

**Structure Decision**: Single Ansible role inside `roles/`, one new entry
in `configure-linux-roles.yml`. Mirrors `android_studio` role layout exactly.

## Complexity Tracking

No constitution violations identified; no entries required.
